{{Infobox group
| name = Farstriders
| introduced = ee-sea-03-of-kings-and-killers
}}

== Of Kings and Killers ==
{{spoiler|book=ee-sea-03-of-kings-and-killers|The [[Farstriders]]' report is expected to be significant.<ref name="ee-sea-03-of-kings-and-killers-c9">''Of Kings and Killers'', chapter 9</ref>}}

== Of Killers and Kings ==
{{spoiler|book=ee-shadow-03-of-killers-and-kings|The [[Farstriders]] provide reports on peace meetings.<ref name="ee-shadow-03-of-killers-and-kings-c14">''Of Killers and Kings'', chapter 14</ref>}}
{{spoiler|book=ee-shadow-03-of-killers-and-kings|The [[Farstriders]] wrote a report regarding [[Estyr]]'s accusations.<ref name="ee-shadow-03-of-killers-and-kings-c14" />}}

== Notes ==
<references />

[[Category:Groups]]
[[Category:Of Kings and Killers]]
[[Category:Of Killers and Kings]]
[[Category:Elder Empire]]
[[Category:Elder Empire groups]]
